payload.answer: Duplicate Slack event delivery detected; no additional durable memory should be committed from the retry.

entity_resolution.reason: The same Slack event ID was delivered twice, so this is a retry/duplicate delivery rather than a distinct new memory signal.

details: Detected duplicate delivery for the same Slack event ID.
No memory card created to avoid double-counting the same fact.
Underlying ambiguous statement remains: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.
